title: grill-design-tree clarification interview
invocation_hint: Invoke SKI-PRO-1000 (grill-design-tree) and produce 5-10 follow-up questions for the operator about the design below.
task_description: The operator says : 'we need a notification system for our app'. Apply the grill-design-tree skill to surface the ambiguities, decision branches, and missing constraints before any design.
